_comment: XL Fitness AI Overseer — Model registry. Weights are NOT in git. Deploy via 'make deploy PI=...'
_pipeline: Mac Mini trains PyTorch → exports ONNX → scp to Pi → Pi runs onnxruntime

_overview.project_1_rep_tracking: LSTM activity classifier — 8 classes, 30-frame keypoint window
_overview.project_2_weight_id: YOLOv11 + HSV colour — identifies AlphaFit barbell plate weights
_overview.project_3_user_tracking: InsightFace ArcFace entry ID + IoU gym floor tracking
_overview.project_4_e_weight: Electric motor stack API — Phase 2, no camera needed

pose_detection._description: Person detection + 17 COCO keypoints. Runs on Hailo NPU at 30fps.

versions.description: YOLOv11n-pose — nano, 30fps on Hailo AI HAT+
versions.notes: .pt auto-downloaded by ultralytics. Convert to .hef for Hailo via hailo_model_zoo.

activity_classifier._description: 8-class gym activity classifier. The rep-counting brain. Softmax gate = one state at a time.
activity_classifier._architecture: LSTM(51→128) → Dropout(0.3) → Linear(128→64) → ReLU → Linear(64→8) → softmax
activity_classifier._gating: ActivityStateMachine: IDLE phase allows classes 0-2, ENGAGED phase allows 2-7

versions.description: Angle threshold state machine — baseline, no ML
versions.notes: Current live system. Replace with v1.0-lstm once 300+ annotations collected.

versions.description: Fast MLP — stepping stone before LSTM (< 500 samples)
versions.notes: Train with train/train_pytorch.py once 60+ samples collected.

versions.description: Full LSTM — target model. Requires 300+ annotated segments.
versions.notes: Train with train/train_pytorch.py. Auto-retrains using Pi review clips.

weight_id._description: Detects AlphaFit barbell plate stripe colours → kg values. Camera looks along sleeve from side.
weight_id._input: 1280×720 BGR frame — camera on barbell frame, side angle
weight_id._architecture: YOLOv11n object detection + HSV colour verification
weight_id._fallback: Whole-frame HSV band scan (colour_matcher.py) if no YOLO model

versions.description: HSV colour band scanning — no training needed, moderate accuracy
versions.notes: Works out of the box. Run: python3 weight_id/detector.py for a demo.

versions.description: Fine-tuned YOLOv11n on AlphaFit plates — target model
versions.notes: Train with: python3 weight_id/train.py. Need 50+ images per plate colour.

face_id._description: Member identification via ArcFace embeddings at the gym door.
face_id._output: 512-dim embedding → cosine similarity match against member registry
face_id._architecture: InsightFace buffalo_sc (pre-trained ArcFace — not retrained by us)

versions.description: InsightFace buffalo_sc — fast, accurate for 4–50 member gym
versions.notes: Auto-downloaded by insightface. Enrol members: python3 face/enroll_member.py

gym_tracker._description: IoU-based person tracker — follows people across the gym floor within one camera zone.
gym_tracker._input: YOLO person bounding boxes (from pose_detection model)
gym_tracker._output: Track IDs linked to member identities in PersonDB
gym_tracker._architecture: IoU matching (deterministic) + InsightFace mid-floor face checks

versions.description: Greedy IoU tracker — no ML, works out of the box
versions.notes: Phase 2: upgrade to ByteTrack for multi-camera cross-zone tracking.

weight_verifier._description: Confirms the weight stack actually moved during a rep (prevents phantom reps).
weight_verifier._input: ROI crop of weight stack across rep frames
weight_verifier._architecture: Dense optical flow (Farneback) — deterministic, no ML

versions.description: Farneback optical flow on weight stack ROI
versions.notes: In pi/weight_tracker.py. Calibrate WEIGHT_STACK_ROI in pi/config.py.

e_weight_stack._description: Electric brushless motor weight stacks for cable machines. Weight read from motor API.
e_weight_stack._output: float — exact weight in kg (100% accurate, no camera needed)
e_weight_stack._architecture: HTTP API client (no ML) — motor controller firmware by hardware team

versions.description: REST API client for motor controller — Phase 2
versions.notes: Hardware not yet built. Phase 2. See e_weight/stack_client.py for API spec.

review_loop._description: Closed-loop retraining. Pi flags uncertain clips → human annotates → Mac Mini retrains.
flow: Pi runs ONNX → confidence < 0.50 → clip_reporter.py saves 30-frame keypoint window
Mac Mini: git pull → python3 pose/review_server.py → http://localhost:8787
Human clicks correct class → review_status: reviewed → git commit
make train → new ONNX → make deploy PI=pi@IP → Pi now smarter
